```{ojs}
//| echo: false
//| output: false
GU = ({
  navy: "#002967",
  red: "#c8102e",
  s1: "#1c5cab",
  s2: "#1baf7a",
  s3: "#c8102e",
  s4: "#eda100",
  ink: "#1a1a1a",
  muted: "#898781",
  grid: "#e1e0d9",
  seq: ["#cde2fb", "#9ec5f4", "#6da7ec", "#3987e5", "#256abf", "#184f95", "#0d366b"]
})
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
//| output: false
fnum = d3.format(",")
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
//| output: false
fmoney = (x) => x == null || isNaN(x) ? "—"
  : Math.abs(x) >= 1e9 ? "$" + d3.format(".2f")(x / 1e9) + "B"
  : Math.abs(x) >= 1e6 ? "$" + d3.format(".1f")(x / 1e6) + "M"
  : "$" + d3.format(",.0f")(x)
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
//| output: false
fpct = (x) => x == null || isNaN(x) ? "—" : d3.format(".1f")(x) + "%"
```
